input.user_input: Draft a non-solicitation clause I can insert into an employment agreement. The restriction should cover employees and clients for 24 months post-termination.

actual:
Here is a standard non-solicitation clause covering both employees and clients for a 24-month period. You can copy and paste this directly into your employment agreement. 

***

**Non-Solicitation.** 
During the term of Employee's employment with the Company and for a period of twenty-four (24) months immediately following the termination of Employee's employment for any reason (the "Restricted Period"), Employee shall not, directly or indirectly, on Employee's own behalf or on behalf of any other person or entity:

**(a) Non-Solicitation of Employees.** Solicit, induce, recruit, or encourage any of the Company's employees, consultants, or independent contractors to terminate their relationship with the Company, or attempt to solicit, induce, recruit
